story.iWant: see visual pulses on spaces that need attention
story.soThat: I can quickly identify blockers or active discussions

tasks.task: CSS Token Extensions for Beacon States (AC4, AC6)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Create AttentionBeacon component as an animated pulse ring/halo. Beacon indicator: 10px circle with box-shadow glow. Pulse animation: 2s infinite for normal severity, 1s for critical. Component accepts severity prop: 'normal' | 'critical'.

Create useAttentionBeacon(spaceId) hook returning status, severity, and last change timestamp. Hook evaluates beacon trigger rules based on space state. Debounces duplicate pings (300ms minimum between state changes). Returns structured data: { active: boolean, severity: 'normal' | 'critical', reason: string, lastChange: Date }.

Beacon triggers when occupancy > 80% of capacity. Beacon triggers when "Blocker" logged in space activity. Beacon triggers when "Help Requested" signal is active. Logic extensible for future conditions.

Normal severity: Uses theme accent color (--vo-beacon-color) with 2s pulse animation. Critical severity: Red (#ff4d4d) with 1s fast pulse animation. Severity auto-escalates from normal to critical based on duration (>5min) or condition severity.

Beacon appears in card header area (top-right corner). Beacon visible in all layout modes (Orbit, Analyst, Cinema). Beacon position: absolute, 10px from top and right edges. Uses existing card structure without major layout changes.

Beacon inherits glow color from CSS variables defined in Story 3.1. Normal beacon uses --vo-beacon-color and --vo-beacon-glow tokens. Critical beacon uses hardcoded red (#ff4d4d) with rgba glow for consistency. Animation respects prefers-reduced-motion setting.

Screen reader announces beacon status: "Attention needed: [reason]". Beacon has aria-live="polite" for status changes. Reduced motion: replaces pulse animation with opacity fade. Keyboard navigable when focused on parent card.

doc.title: Space Grid Unleashed - Interactive Prototype
doc.snippet: Defines .beacon-indicator with 10px circle, box-shadow glow, and pulse/pulse-fast animations. Critical variant uses #ff4d4d with faster 1s animation.

doc.title: Virtual Office UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: AttentionBeacon micro-component providing pulse animations and logging hooks. Hook useAttentionBeacon(spaceId) returning status, severity, last change. Supports idle, info, warning, critical states with snoozed option.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Beacon triggers on occupancy >80%, blocker logged, or help requested. Visual severity levels: normal (theme accent, 2s) and critical (red #ff4d4d, 1s). Visible in all layout modes.

doc.title: Architecture Review
doc.snippet: CSS-first approach with theme tokens. All colors derive from CSS custom properties. Component hooks encapsulate business logic. Repository pattern for data access.

doc.title: Previous Story Reference
doc.snippet: CSS tokens added to tokens.css following pattern. Animation keyframes with 2s duration. Accessibility: aria-live, screen reader text, reduced motion. 32 tests covering all ACs.

file.reason: MODIFY: Add beacon-specific tokens (--vo-beacon-critical, --vo-beacon-critical-glow), pulse animations, and reduced motion variants. Existing beacon tokens partially defined.
MODIFY: Import and integrate AttentionBeacon component in card header. Add useAttentionBeacon hook call. Position beacon absolute top-right.
REFERENCE: Styling patterns for theme-aware indicators. Badge structure and tooltip usage. Use as pattern for AttentionBeacon component.
MODIFY: Add export for AttentionBeacon component.
REFERENCE: Stacking layout pattern and theme token usage from Story 3.3.
REFERENCE: Status props pattern (isSpeaking, isPresenting, isMuted). Accessibility patterns from Story 3.3.
REFERENCE: Testing patterns for component with status states, accessibility attributes, and theme compatibility.
REFERENCE: Existing vo-beacon box-shadow utility. May extend if needed.

constraints.constraint: Use CSS-first approach with theme tokens. All beacon colors derive from CSS custom properties (--vo-beacon-color, --vo-beacon-glow).
Follow component props pattern from StatusIndicators.tsx and UserAvatarPresence.tsx. Use cn() utility for className composition.
Create NEW files for AttentionBeacon.tsx and useAttentionBeacon.ts. MODIFY existing ModernSpaceCard.tsx to integrate.
Follow testing patterns from user-avatar-presence-v2.test.tsx. Mock external dependencies (Tooltip, cn). Test all severity states and accessibility.
Include aria-live="polite", role="status", visually hidden screen reader text. Support prefers-reduced-motion with opacity fade alternative.
Animations must maintain 60 FPS with multiple beacons visible. Use CSS animations, not JS-based.
Critical beacon uses fixed red (#ff4d4d) across all themes for urgency visibility. Normal beacon inherits from theme accent.

interface.name: AttentionBeaconProps
BeaconState
BeaconOptions
useAttentionBeacon

tests.standards: Use Vitest with Testing Library React. Mock external components (Tooltip, EnhancedAvatarV2) to isolate unit tests. Test component rendering, state changes, accessibility attributes, and CSS class application. Follow patterns from __tests__/user-avatar-presence-v2.test.tsx. Group tests by Acceptance Criteria.

ideas.idea: Test AttentionBeacon renders 10px circle when active=true. Test returns null when active=false.
Test normal severity applies vo-beacon-pulse animation class.
Test critical severity applies vo-beacon-pulse-fast animation and red color.
Test useAttentionBeacon returns inactive state by default (empty space).
Test hook triggers beacon when occupancy exceeds 80% threshold.
Test hook triggers critical beacon for blocker condition.
Test hook triggers beacon for help requested signal.
Test auto-escalation from normal to critical after 5 minutes.
Test debounce prevents rapid state changes within 300ms.
Test beacon renders in ModernSpaceCard header area.
Test beacon visible in all variants (orbit, analyst, cinema).
Test beacon uses theme accent color for normal severity.
Test beacon uses fixed red for critical severity across themes.
Test visually hidden text includes reason.
Test reduced motion applies opacity fade animation.
